title: Indie Sprint State
description: Per-project sprint state for indie-maker. Lives at `projects/{name}/.indie-sprint.json`. Read by SessionStart hook, updated by PostToolUse hook on skill output writes. Hand-editable as fallback.

$schema.description: Optional. Path or URL to this schema for IDE/CLI validation.

project.description: Machine-readable project slug. Must match the folder name under projects/.

display_name.description: Optional human-readable name. Defaults to `project` if omitted.

status.description: Lifecycle. active=working on it. dormant=paused. killed=D29 Kill verdict, retro done. shipped=Go verdict, in growth phase.

started_at.description: Sprint D1 date (YYYY-MM-DD). current_day = (today - started_at) + 1 — D1 is the start day, not D0.

stack.description: Tech stack identifier. `indie-default` = Supabase + Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui. Other values (e.g., 'nestjs', 'fastapi') route to knowledge/senior-reference/ guides.

current_day.description: [DERIVED] Days elapsed since started_at, where D1 is the start. Auto-recomputed by SessionStart hook. Stored for readability when inspecting the file.

current_phase.description: [DERIVED] Sprint phase. Computed from the last completed_skill via skill→phase mapping.

completed_skills.description: Skills completed in chronological order. Appended by PostToolUse hook when a skill writes its output file(s).

next_recommended.description: [DERIVED] Next skill(s) to run, computed from the skill dependency graph (lib/skill-dependency-graph.json — L2.4).

kill_criteria.description: D29 Kill/Go thresholds set during planning (indie-planner output). Metric names are free-form but should match keys in `metrics`. Standard SaaS examples: ph_votes, paid_users_d29, mrr_d21_usd, retention_d14_pct.

metrics.description: Live metric snapshot. Hand-edited or auto-updated by indie-analyst. Compared against kill_criteria at D29 gate. Use `null` for not-yet-measured.

last_updated.description: ISO timestamp of last metrics update. null until first measurement.

launch_date.description: D14 launch date once it occurs.

verdict.description: D29 Kill/Go verdict set by indie-analyst. null pre-gate.

notes.description: Free-form notes — pivots, blockers, anything that doesn't fit elsewhere.
